visual_narrative: Energetic ok gesture opens into cycling through Benimaclet streets. The mesa redonda is revealed on the ground in Trinitat with two angles. Suspense builds through cycling and a cinematic Trinitat street scene before the price shock. The close winds down through Jardin Real with a descending camera shot.
